title: Fixity Information
description: The information which documents the mechanisms that ensure that the Content Information object has not been altered in an undocumented manner.

definitions.definition: The information which documents the mechanisms that ensure that the Content Information object has not been altered in an undocumented manner. An example is a Cyclical Redundancy Check (CRC) code for a file.
definitions.sources:
- [Reference Model for an Open Archival Information System (OAIS), Recommended Practice CCSDS 650.0-M-2, Magenta Book 2012](https://public.ccsds.org/pubs/650x0m2.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
